meta.title: GUIMARAS
meta.subtitle: Guimaras, Western Visayas
meta.description: Guimaras is a small island province in the Visayan Sea known as the 'Mango Capital of the Philippines,' producing the world-renowned Guimaras sweet mango. Beyond its orchards, it offers pristine beaches, clear-water lagoons, historic churches, and the charming Roca Encantada — a riverside mansion in lush gardens.

attractions.name: Roca Encantada
attractions.description: A majestic mansion on a rocky promontory surrounded by lush botanical gardens.

attractions.name: Trappist Monastery
attractions.description: A peaceful monastery famous for homemade mango products and spiritual retreats.

attractions.name: Guisi Beach & Lighthouse
attractions.description: A pristine white-sand beach with a century-old lighthouse at the cliff's edge.

attractions.name: Alubihod Beach
attractions.description: One of Guimaras' most beautiful beaches with fine white sand and clear blue water.

attractions.name: Pitstop Mango Farm
attractions.description: Walk through sprawling mango orchards and taste the world-famous Guimaras variety.

attractions.name: Natago Beach
attractions.description: A quiet secluded beach accessible by boat, beloved by locals for its calm waters.

attractions.name: Sto. Niño de Jordan Church
attractions.description: The oldest church in Guimaras, a centuries-old heritage site at the heart of Jordan.

attractions.name: Guimaras Mangrove Forest
attractions.description: Vast mangrove eco-park with walking bridges and rich coastal biodiversity.

attractions.name: Dolores Cave
attractions.description: A mystical cave with stalactite formations and a small chapel inside.

activities.name: Guimaras Island Hopping
activities.description: Explore small islands, sandbars, and snorkeling spots around the Guimaras coast.

activities.name: Mango Farm Tour
activities.description: A guided tour of the famous mango orchards, tasting different mango varieties.

activities.name: Manggahan Festival
activities.description: Join the annual mango harvest festival with mango-eating contests and street fairs.

activities.name: Guimaras Bike Tour
activities.description: Cycle through quiet provincial roads past mango orchards and coastal villages.

activities.name: Sea Kayaking
activities.description: Kayak along Guimaras' calm coastline, exploring sea caves and hidden coves.

activities.name: Snorkeling at Alubihod
activities.description: Discover colorful sea life in the protected waters off Alubihod Beach.

activities.name: Trappist Monastery Retreat
activities.description: A spiritual day retreat with silent reflection and monastic mango product tasting.

activities.name: Traditional Fishing Trip
activities.description: Join local fishermen on an early morning traditional fishing expedition.

activities.name: Guisi Lighthouse Hike
activities.description: Short coastal hike leading to the century-old lighthouse with stunning ocean views.

food.name: Fresh Guimaras Mango
food.description: The world's sweetest mango — succulent, fragrant, and bursting with tropical flavor.

food.name: Mango Pizza
food.description: A unique local creation: thin-crust pizza topped generously with sweet Guimaras mango slices.

food.name: Guimaras Mango Ice Cream
food.description: Creamy homemade ice cream crafted from 100% fresh Guimaras mangoes.

food.name: Mango Chiffon Cake
food.description: Light and airy chiffon cake with fresh mango cream, a Guimaras bakery staple.

food.name: Sinuglaw
food.description: A combination of grilled pork belly and kinilaw, a beloved Filipino surf-and-turf dish.

food.name: Ginataan
food.description: A sweet coconut milk stew of rice balls, yam, and banana — a comforting Filipino merienda.

food.name: Guimaras Tuba
food.description: Freshly tapped coconut wine from Guimaras palms, enjoyed chilled on the beach.

food.name: Grilled Fresh Seafood
food.description: Grilled prawns, squid, and fish straight from the daily catch of Guimaras fishermen.

food.name: Mango Pastillas
food.description: Soft milk candy rolled in sugar and infused with real Guimaras mango — a popular pasalubong.

events.name: Manggahan Festival
events.description: May — Guimaras' flagship festival celebrating the mango harvest with fairs and concerts.

events.name: Guimaras Foundation Day
events.description: May 22 — province-wide celebrations marking the founding of Guimaras.

events.name: Mango Queen Pageant
events.description: Annual beauty pageant crowning the Mango Queen of Guimaras during Manggahan.

events.name: Guimaras Ocean Triathlon
events.description: Annual multi-sport race across Guimaras' seas, roads, and trails.

events.name: Paraw Regatta
events.description: February — traditional sailboat race from Iloilo City to Guimaras and back.

events.name: Guimaras Eco Day
events.description: June — island-wide cleanup and reforestation event honoring Guimaras' environment.

events.name: Mango Cooking Competition
events.description: Annual culinary contest where chefs showcase creative dishes using Guimaras mangoes.

events.name: Guisi Lighthouse Day
events.description: October — heritage celebration at the iconic Guisi lighthouse with cultural programs.

events.name: Alubihod Beach Party
events.description: December — beach concert and bonfire event at the shores of Alubihod Beach.

accommodations.name: Raymen Beach Resort
accommodations.description: Popular beachfront resort with nipa cottages and water sports facilities.

accommodations.name: Guimaras Island Resort
accommodations.description: Peaceful island resort with direct beach access and sea-view cottages.

accommodations.name: Mango Grove Villas
accommodations.description: Villas set among working mango orchards with farm-to-table dining experiences.

accommodations.name: Andana Resort
accommodations.description: Boutique resort with lush tropical gardens and a beachfront infinity pool.

accommodations.name: Natago Lodge
accommodations.description: Rustic lodge accessible by boat, perfect for secluded island getaways.

accommodations.name: Costa Rica Resort Guimaras
accommodations.description: Family resort with a wave pool, water slides, and beachside cabanas.

accommodations.name: Trappist Monastery Guesthouse
accommodations.description: Simple, peaceful accommodation in the monastery grounds for spiritual retreats.

accommodations.name: Balay na Bato Guesthouse
accommodations.description: Heritage stone house converted into a charming guesthouse in Jordan town.

accommodations.name: Isla Resort Guimaras
accommodations.description: Modern island resort with glass-floor chalets over the water and stunning sea views.
